Save Up To $20
Off Groceries!!
With Each Vaccine
Walk-Ins Welcome!
*Restrictions apply. Visit pharmacy for
details. Scan QR code to schedule an
appointment
*Offer valid through 12/31/26. Qualifying items do not
include immunizations received in AR, immunizations
received by customers under 60 years old in NJ and
immunizations other than COVID-19 vaccines in NY. 10% off
on a single grocery purchase of qualifying items up to
$200 (up to $20 total value). $40 minimum purchase
required. Limit 1 coupon per transaction. In the event of
a return, coupon savings may be deducted from refund. Not
valid toward previous purchases. *Restrictions apply.
Visit pharmacy for details.
